compiled_state.title: Create per-worktree-review-commit.md orchestration prompt
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Create plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/per-worktree-review-commit.md with the serial per-worktree processing flow:

For each worktree returned by sub-agents:
1. cd into worktree directory
2. Dispatch review sub-agent in worktree cwd (ARTIFACTS_DIR isolated via REPO_ROOT hash)
3. If review passes: execute COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md in worktree context
4. Use record-test-status.sh to record test results in worktree ARTIFACTS_DIR before commit
5. Merge worktree branch into session branch
6. If merge succeeds: remove worktree (cleanup)
7. If merge fails: flag for re-implementation (delegate to conflict story)
8. Repeat for next worktree

Include: worktree retention protocol, merge-state handling, first-pass-first-merge ordering.

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/per-worktree-review-commit.md (CREATE)

### TDD Exemption
Unit test exemption — criterion 3: static prompt file. Behaviorally tested via sprint eval.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Prompt file exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/per-worktree-review-commit.md
- [ ] Contains serial review loop
  Verify: grep -qi 'for each worktree\|serial.*review\|per.worktree' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/per-worktree-review-commit.md
- [ ] Contains retention protocol
  Verify: grep -qi 'retain\|retention\|do NOT remove' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/per-worktree-review-commit.md

comments.body: Fixed: per-worktree-review-commit.md created with serial review/commit/merge protocol.
comments.author: Test
